postconditions: result == (previous_head < u64::MAX && committed_head == previous_head + 1 && parent_points_to_previous_head == 1 && previous_blocks_unchanged == 1 && previous_receipts_unchanged == 1 && previous_indexes_unchanged == 1)
acceptance_criteria: A canonical block commit is safe only when it appends exactly previous_head + 1, its parent points to the prior head, and prior block, receipt, and index observations remain unchanged.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core --test p0_safety && cargo test -p ic-evm-gateway gateway_submit_ic_tx_adapter_preserves_queue_and_receipt_invariants
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core P0 pure tests plus gateway append-only production adapter evidence
